title: Speedboat Rental in Estepona Marina, Prices, Boats & Tips for 2026
html:
Speedboat rental in Estepona Marina offers a direct gateway to the Costa del Sol's sparkling Mediterranean waters. Departing from the modern marina complex, you can hire a 20-foot motorboat from around €250 for a half day through BoatHire24, the marketplace that connects renters with verified owners. Whether you want to explore the coastline or drop anchor for a swim, the options are plentiful.

How much does it cost to rent a speedboat in Estepona Marina?

Prices range from €200 for a small motorboat for half a day to €1,200 for a crewed yacht for a full day. For a speedboat like the Olympic 490, expect to pay around €250 for three hours or €350 for a full day. The exact price depends on the season, boat size, and whether a skipper is included. You can compare verified boat listings on the yacht charter in Estepona Marina page.

Do you need a licence to rent a speedboat in Estepona Marina?

For motorboats under 15 horsepower, no licence is required, but most rental speedboats are more powerful. In Spain, the Permiso de Navegación (PNB) is needed for boats up to 24 metres in length and powers up to 40 kW. Rental operators at Estepona Marina typically offer skippered charters or may accept an International Certificate of Competence. Always confirm exact requirements with the operator before booking.

From Estepona Marina, the sheltered bay of Playa del Cristo is just 2 nautical miles west, ideal for a calm swim stop away from the main harbour traffic.

Where to set off in Estepona Marina

Estepona Marina, Puerto Deportivo de Estepona, is your departure point. From here, head east to Puerto Banús (5 nautical miles) or west to the cliffs of Punta de la Doncella. Further east lies Marbella Marina (7 nautical miles), while the upmarket port of Sotogrande is about 15 nautical miles south-east. For a day trip, the island of Alborán is more than 50 nautical miles south, but closer you can anchor at Playa del Saladillo or the rocky coves of Cabo Roche.

Which boat to rent

  1. Speedboat (Olympic 490), Best for fast, agile trips and watersports; seats 4, 5 guests; from €200 half-day. See the Olympic 490 charter page for full details.
  2. RIB (Quicksilver Activ 605), Ideal for families and coastal exploring; seats 6, 7; from €300 half-day.
  3. Motor Yacht (Azimut 50), Perfect for luxury cruising with a skipper; seats 10, 12; from €800 full day.
  4. Catamaran (Lagoon 42), Stable and spacious for group charters; seats 8, 10; from €1,000 full day.

Costs and price breakdown

  • Shared tour: from €60 per person for a 2-hour sightseeing trip.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): €200, €350.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): €800, €1,500, often with crew and lunch.
  • Luxury crewed yacht (Azimut or Sunseeker, full day): €1,200, €2,500.

At a glance

  • Price range: €200, €2,500 per day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: half-day (4h) or full-day (8h)
  • Max guests: 12 on larger yachts
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Estepona Marina

Can I rent a speedboat without a licence in Estepona Marina?

You may rent low-powered boats under 15hp without a licence, but most speedboats require a valid permit or a hired skipper.

What is the best time of year to rent a speedboat in Estepona?

The high season from June to September offers sunny skies and calm seas, though July and August can be busy with the Levante wind.

How far can I go from Estepona Marina in a half-day trip?

A half-day rental allows you to reach Puerto Banús or Marbella, about 5, 7 nautical miles east, with time to anchor and swim.

Are there any hidden costs when renting a boat in Estepona Marina?

Always check for fuel, skipper fees, and insurance waivers; these are often extra and can add 20, 30 per cent to the base price.

Whether you are planning a summer holiday or a leisurely weekend, speedboat rental in Estepona Marina offers flexibility and access to the beautiful Costa del Sol coastline. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Estepona Marina or list your own, and in 2026 the platform continues to expand. If you own a boat, you can become a host and earn from your vessel when you are not using it.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Estepona Marina and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
